The health benefits of Palmijuncus include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. The bioactive constituents of Palmijuncus include alkaloids such as oxindole and isoxindole alkaloids, as well as other compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids.
